narrative: Strait of Hormuz closure pushes WTI crude above $101, driving a geopolitical risk premium as US CPI looms; USD/CAD firms to 1.3704 despite oil strength as risk-off sentiment and a 150bp Fed-BoC carry advantage support the greenback. Gold lower -0.38% near $4,710; equities +0.19%; DXY +0.36%; VIX 18.8. USD/JPY bids to 157.58 on 300bp carry as intervention doubts persist. Watch US CPI data at 12:30 UTC for immediate directional impetus.
